description: P1 (linear) tetrahedral local matrices for the canonical reference tet [(0,0,0),(1,0,0),(0,1,0),(0,0,1)] — the affine identity. NumPy baseline produced by reference/numpy/p1_local_matrices.py via gen_p1_local_per_case.py.
units: dimensionless (geometry is unit-scaled; values are exact rationals encoded as f64)

coords.description: Per-element vertex coordinates [n_elem, 4 vertices, 3 spatial dims].

k_local.description: Local stiffness K_{ij} = V (grad phi_i . grad phi_j), row-major. Tolerance set loose enough for the f32 default backend; the Rust comparator layers a tighter backend-aware rel-tol check on top (see crates/geode-validation/tests/p1_local_numpy_reference.rs).

m_local.description: Local consistent mass M_{ij} = (V/20)(1 + delta_{ij}), row-major.

signed_volume.description: Signed element volume V = det(J)/6. Positive for the canonical orientation.

provenance.verified_against: crates/geode-validation/tests/p1_local_numpy_reference.rs (Burn vs. NumPy on the same five canonical cases)
